name: On The Way Pvt Sch Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Private/parochial school families in Port St. Lucie / Tradition area; not a public-district contractor
recent_news: Continues to operate as independent local door-to-door private student transport provider; no M&A signals found (2024-2026)
fit_notes: Very small private door-to-door operator (~65 employees, est. ~$2.7M rev), parent-pay model rather than district contracts. Limited platform fit for Summit unless used as a Florida bolt-on in Treasure Coast; revenue mix and lack of district contracts reduce strategic value.

name: Vendetti Bus Co
principals: Joseph L. Vendetti Sr. (founder of Vendetti Motors, 1961); Joey Vendetti (Controller); Julie Vendetti-Lomberto (oversees School Bus Operations)
districts_or_customers: ~6-7 MA school districts including Blackstone Valley Regional Vocational Technical HS, Northbridge Middle School; hubs in Bellingham, Milford, and Uxbridge MA
recent_news: Long-standing family-owned operation tied to Vendetti Motors dealership (Franklin, MA, founded 1961); school bus division continues to serve multiple MA districts; no acquisition reported (2024-2026)
fit_notes: Classic family-owned MA tuck-in: multi-district contracts, 3 operating hubs in MetroWest/Blackstone Valley, second-generation family management. Potential succession candidate given multi-decade history; fits Summit's MA platform footprint.

name: Philly Transportation
owner_or_parent: independent (privately held LLC; ownership not publicly disclosed)
principals: Joshua Tirado (employee/school bus driver - not owner per LinkedIn); ownership not publicly disclosed
districts_or_customers: School District of Philadelphia routes; Cheltenham SD; Green Woods Charter School; The Rock School; After School Activities Partnerships; serves Philadelphia, Montgomery, Bucks, Chester, Delaware counties
recent_news: Operates 9 service centers across 4 PA locations (East Falls, Bridesburg, Cheltenham/Abington, Chester); confirmed NOT in Beacon Mobility portfolio as of 2026; no M&A activity reported
fit_notes: Strong fit for Summit: independent Philadelphia metro operator with claimed 450-unit fleet, multi-county footprint (5 PA counties), and contracts spanning Philadelphia SD, charter schools, and suburban districts. Significant scale anchor in PA; fleet count vs ~37 employees figure warrants diligence. Beacon already holds nearby PA assets (Easton Coach, Tri County, Palmeri) so competitive dynamics in play.

name: Gilbert School Bus Co
owner_or_parent: independent (Joseph J. Gilbert Sr. d/b/a Gilbert School Bus Company LC)
principals: Joseph J. Gilbert Sr. (Owner); Edwina Gilbert (Co-operator)
districts_or_customers: Cecil County Public Schools (listed bus contractor); North East, MD / Rising Sun MD area
recent_news: Long-tenured Cecil County contractor (DOT# 1085043, registered since 2003; company founded 1989); husband-and-wife operated; no M&A signals found (2024-2026)
fit_notes: Classic Summit tuck-in profile: ~35-year-old family-owned single-district Cecil County MD contractor, owner-operator husband-and-wife team, founders likely at/near retirement age - strong succession signal. Small size (~40 employees) suits bolt-on consolidation strategy; expands Summit's MD/MidAtlantic footprint.

name: Pro Transportation
principals: Lucy Modric (listed Owner per source data; resident of Lake Worth FL)
districts_or_customers: Palm Beach County, FL; serves elderly, mobility-impaired clients, dialysis/hospital discharge/outpatient post-surgery riders; NO confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: Marketed as Palm Beach County's only NEMT provider with a medical director; ~39 years in business per directory listings; no M&A activity reported
fit_notes: NOT a core fit - this is an NEMT/medical transport operator, not a school-bus contractor (consistent with school=0 / special_needs=1 in source data, but special_needs here = medical/wheelchair, not SPED student transport). Would only matter to Summit if pursuing NEMT/SPED-adjacent diversification; otherwise deprioritize.
